strategy_summary: Post-release momentum building through fan engagement and behind-the-scenes content, celebrating the EP's one-year anniversary milestone. Focus on community building and showcasing Jerry's creative process while highlighting standout tracks from the project.
posting_cadence: 3-4 posts per week across all platforms

posts.caption: One year ago today we dropped Jerry Mane's EP and honestly, we're still not over these tracks 🔥 Which one's been on repeat for you? Drop your fave in the comments 👇
posts.call_to_action: Comment your favorite track from the EP
posts.visual_direction: Collage of EP artwork with 'One Year Later' text overlay, maybe some fan comments or streaming stats

posts.caption: Found this gem in the archives - Jerry Mane laying down the bassline that became the backbone of track 3. The magic happens in the smallest moments ✨
posts.visual_direction: Raw studio footage of Jerry working on synths/production setup, low lighting, intimate feel

posts.caption: Friday feeling calls for some Jerry Mane house vibes. This track still hits different every single time we play it in the office. What's everyone's weekend soundtrack looking like?
posts.call_to_action: Share what you're listening to this weekend
posts.visual_direction: Animated waveform visualization with EP artwork, vibrant colors matching the house vibe

posts.caption: Your messages about Jerry's EP still make our day every time. This community is everything 💙 Keep the love coming, we see you and we appreciate you
posts.call_to_action: DM us your thoughts on the EP
posts.visual_direction: Screenshot compilation of positive fan messages and comments, warm color palette

posts.caption: Jerry breaks down the drum pattern that drives the main DnB track. Sometimes the simplest ideas create the biggest impact 🥁
posts.call_to_action: Try this technique in your own productions
posts.visual_direction: Close-up shots of drum machine/software, Jerry explaining the process, split screen showing waveforms

posts.caption: Throwback to the late nights and coffee runs that fueled this EP. Jerry's dedication to getting every sound just right was unreal. The grind was worth every moment 🌙☕
posts.call_to_action: Share your own late-night creative moments
posts.visual_direction: Moody nighttime studio shots, empty coffee cups, Jerry working late with soft lighting

posts.caption: When Jerry Mane's dubstep drop hits and you remember why you fell in love with electronic music in the first place 🔊💥
posts.call_to_action: Tag someone who needs to hear this
posts.visual_direction: Quick cuts synced to the dubstep drop, bass visualization effects, high energy transitions

key_dates.event: One year anniversary of EP release
key_dates.content_note: Celebrate milestone with community engagement focus

content_notes: Focus on authentic storytelling and community building during this post-release period. Use the anniversary as a natural hook for nostalgia content while keeping Jerry Mane top-of-mind for fans. Mix technical production content with emotional behind-the-scenes moments to appeal to both music producers and casual listeners.
